# Darts Daily
> Your daily hub for darts news, live events, player stats and trivia. Covering the PDC tour from around the world.

## About
Darts Daily is a darts website covering daily player profiles, stats, trivia, live events, news and expert guides. We cover the PDC tour, major events and everything darts.

## Website
- URL: https://www.dartsdaily.net
- Language: English

## Guides
- [Dart Board Distance & Height](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/dart-board-distance-and-height): Official measurements and step-by-step setup guide for dart board height (5ft 8in) and throwing distance (7ft 9¼in).
- [How to Score Darts](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/how-to-score-darts): Complete scoring guide covering 501, 301, Cricket, checkout charts and scoring tips for beginners.
- [Best Dart Boards 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/best-dart-boards): Top dartboards reviewed and compared including Winmau Blade 6, Target Aspar, ONE80 and budget options.
- [PDC Order of Merit 2026](https://www.dartsdaily.net/guides/pdc-order-of-merit): Current top 32 rankings, how the ranking system works, prize money breakdown and qualification explained.
